rules.description: Beginning of Message — identifies the IFCSUM forwarding and consolidation summary message

document_name_code.description: Document name code — 785 = Forwarding and consolidation summary message

document_identifier.description: Unique document/message identifier (typically matches the interchange control reference)

rules.description: Date/Time/Period — used at message level for processing date/time and dispatch date, at shipment level for estimated delivery, at document level for invoice date

date_time_period_function_code_qualifier.description: Date/Time/Period function code qualifier. 9=Processing date/time, 11=Dispatch date, 191=Estimated Delivery date/time, 3=Commercial Invoice date/time

date_time_period_value.description: Date/Time/Period value. Format depends on format code: CCYYMMDDHHMM for 203, CCYYMMDD for 102

rules.description: Date/Time/Period at SG34 Invoice Level — Commercial Invoice date

date_time_period_function_code_qualifier.description: Date/Time/Period function code qualifier — 3 = Commercial Invoice date/time

rules.description: Consignment Information — identifies a consignment/shipment within the message

consolidation_item_number.description: Sequence number of the consignment within the message. 9999 is used for Commercial Invoice data groups.

transport_document_reference.description: Transport document number composite — DHL waybill/AWB number, optionally followed by colon and document type code (e.g. :5 = Bill of lading)

rules.description: Control Totals — provides control totals for gross weight, total packages, volume, or transport units

control_total_type_code_qualifier.description: Control total type code qualifier. 7=Gross Weight, 11=Total number of Packages (max 999), 15=Cube/Volume, 56=Total number of transport units (LBBX)

control_total_value.description: Control total value. Max 18 digits. Decimal sign may be point or comma per UNA segment.

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code. With 7: KGM or LBR. With 15: MTQ, CMQ, or INQ. Not used with 11 or 56.

rules.description: Contact Information — specifies a contact person within a party (consignor or consignee)

contact_function_code.description: Contact function code. CO=Consignor Contact, AC=Accepting contact (Delivery limited to receiver), IC=Contact information (general)

department_or_employee_name_code.description: Department or employee name code — Not used

department_or_employee_name.description: Department or employee name — contains the contact person name

rules.description: Communication Contact — identifies a communication number (phone, email, fax) for a person or department

communication_address_identifier.description: Communication address identifier (phone, email, fax). If phone begins with '+', use '?' release character before it. Max 70 characters.

communication_address_code_qualifier.description: Communication address code qualifier. EM=Electronic Mail, FX=Telefax, TE=Telephone, AL=Cellular phone (Mobile)

rules.description: Document/Message Details — indicates accompanying documents for customs clearance

document_name_code.description: Document name code — identifies the type of document (composite element)

document_name_responsible_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite sub-element)

document_identifier.description: Document identifier — the document or invoice number

rules.description: Document/Message Details at SG34 Invoice Level — accompanying documents for customs (Invoice Number, Certificate of Origin)

document_name_code.description: Document name code. 380=Commercial Invoice, 325=Proforma Invoice, 861=Certificate of Origin. Full list available from DHL Express.

rules.description: Goods Item Details — identifies a goods item (piece/package) within a consignment

goods_item_number.description: Sequential goods item number within the consignment. May be empty for piece-level entries.

number_and_type_of_packages.description: Number of packages and package type code composite — quantity:type (e.g. 1:CT for carton, 1:PK for package)

rules.description: Governmental Requirements — indicates applicable governmental procedures related to import/export/transport of goods

transport_movement_code.description: Transport movement code — identifies if import or export procedures apply

government_action_code.description: Government action code — type of governmental action required

government_action_code_2.description: Government action code — additional governmental action

rules.description: Equipment Details — identifies a unit of equipment (pallets, boxes) used for transporting goods. Part of SG70.

equipment_type_code.description: Equipment Type code. EFP=Changeable Pallet, EYP=Changeable Box, FPN=Pallet, BPN=Box Pallet

rules.description: Number of Units — specifies the number of pieces of equipment required. Part of SG70.

number_of_units.description: Number of units (element 6350 within C523 composite) — total count of pallets/boxes

rules.description: Free Text — additional information such as trader type, consignment remarks, reason for export, custom remarks, dangerous goods technical name

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — identifies the type of free text (e.g. AAA, AAU, CCI, CEX, AAI, LIN)

text_reference_code.description: Text reference — composite element for coded text reference

text_literal_1.description: Free text value — first line of free text

text_literal_2.description: Free text value — second line of free text (composite sub-element)

text_literal_3.description: Free text value — third line of free text (composite sub-element)

text_literal_4.description: Free text value — fourth line of free text (composite sub-element)

text_literal_5.description: Free text value — fifth line of free text (composite sub-element)

language_name_code.description: Language name code — ISO language code

rules.description: Free Text at SG25 Invoice Level — Reason for Export (mandatory for all shipments)

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier. CEX=Reason for Export (mandatory), AAU=Duty Free Import Remark (Return shipments)

free_text_function_code.description: Free text function code — Not used

free_text_value.description: Free text value — Reason for Export code. Max 5 characters. Values per DHL Express Integrated Solution Reference.

rules.description: Free Text at SG33 Invoice Level — Trading Transaction Type (Governmental Requirements)

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — AAI = Trading Transaction Type

free_text_function_code.description: Free text function code — Not used

free_text_value.description: Free text value — Trading Transaction Type value. Max 15 characters. Full list available from DHL Express.

rules.description: Free Text at SG50 Invoice Line Item — Line Item indicator and description

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier. LIN=Line Item indicator for GID (mandatory), AAA=Line Item Description, Y/N=GST paid flag for Singapore

free_text_function_code.description: Free text function code — Not used

free_text_value.description: Free text value — Line Item Description. Required when qualifier is AAA. Max 512 characters.

rules.description: Place/Location Identification — specifies locations related to incoterms, parties, or country of manufacture

location_name_code.description: Location name code (element 3225 within C517 composite)

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code (element 1131 within C517 composite)

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code (element 3055 within C517 composite)

related_location_name_code.description: Related location name code (element 3223 within C519 composite)

rules.description: Place/Location Identification at SG31 Invoice Level — Place of Incoterms

location_function_code_qualifier.description: Location function code qualifier — 1 = Place of Incoterms

location_name_code.description: Location name code — DHL Express Service Area code for Incoterms location

code_list_identification_code.description: Code List Identification Code — Not used

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code List Responsible agency Code — Not used

location_name.description: Location Name — the location name text

rules.description: Place/Location Identification at SG50 Invoice Line Item — Line Item Country of Manufacture

location_function_code_qualifier.description: Location function code qualifier — 27 = Line Item Country of Manufacture

location_name_code.description: Location name code — country/location code. Codes available from Sales Representative.

code_list_identification_code.description: Code List Identification Code — may be empty

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code List Responsible agency Code — e.g. 6

rules.description: Interchange Header — identifies sender, recipient, date/time, and control reference

syntax_identifier.description: Syntax identifier and version number (e.g. UNOA:2 or UNOC:4)

date_time_of_preparation.description: Date and time of preparation in YYMMDD:HHMM format

rules.description: Message Header — identifies message type and source shipping platform

message_reference_number.description: Application generated unique message reference number, unique for 3 months

common_access_reference.description: DHL Express determined identification for source shipping system platform. Format: 'GM2/' followed by bilaterally agreed platform name.

rules.description: Measurements (Dangerous Goods) — Not to be used for Dangerous Goods when shipping with DHL Express

measured_attribute_code.description: MEASUREMENTS DETAILS composite (C502) — not specified in detail for this context

measure_unit_qualifier.description: Measure unit qualifier (element 6411) within VALUE/RANGE composite (C174)

rules.description: Measurements (Equipment/Load Meters) — length in a vehicle needed for the shipment

measurement_application_qualifier.description: Measurement Application Qualifier (element 6311). Use 'LMT' = Load Meters.

measure_unit_qualifier.description: Measure Unit Qualifier (element 6411) within VALUE RANGE composite (C174). Supported: CMT, MTR, INH.

measurement_value.description: Measurement Value (element 6314). Total loading meters with decimals.

rules.description: Monetary Amount — specifies monetary amounts at message header or shipment level

monetary_amount_type_code_qualifier.description: Monetary amount type code qualifier. 22=Cash on delivery, 43=Declared total customs value, 157=Insurance value, 64=Freight Charge, 39=Invoice Total Amount, 124=Tax Amount.

monetary_amount.description: Monetary amount value. Max 18 digits including 2 decimals. Decimal sign per UNA segment.

currency_identification_code.description: Currency identification code per ISO 4217. Must be shipper country currency except COD (qualifier 22) uses destination currency.

rules.description: Monetary Amount (Invoice Level) — monetary value for an Invoice in SG25. Up to 99 occurrences.

monetary_amount_type_code_qualifier.description: Monetary amount type code qualifier. 43=Declared total customs value, 64=Freight Charge, 55=Import Duty Value, 161=Import Tax Value, 79=Invoice Line Items Total Value. For DDP, 55 and 161 must be provided.

monetary_amount.description: Monetary amount (element 5004). Max 18 digits including 3 mandatory decimals.

currency_identification_code.description: Currency identification code (element 6345). ISO 4217. Shipper country currency except COD uses destination currency.

rules.description: Monetary Amount (Invoice Line Item) — monetary amount associated with a line item in SG50. Up to 9 occurrences.

monetary_amount_type_code_qualifier.description: Monetary amount type code qualifier. 38 or 39=Line Item Value, 146=Single Item (Article) Customs Value.

monetary_amount.description: Monetary amount (element 5004). Max 18 digits including 3 mandatory decimals.

currency_identification_code.description: Currency identification code (element 6345). ISO 4217. Shipper country currency except COD uses destination currency.

rules.description: Name and Address — names and addresses of party roles at consolidation (SG4) and shipment/invoice (SG43) levels

party_qualifier.description: Party qualifier (element 3035) — e.g. CZ=consignor, PW=dispatch party, CN=consignee, FP=freight payer, JD=port of entry

party_identification.description: Party identification (element 3039 within C082) — e.g. account number

building_name.description: Building name (element 3124 within C058, first occurrence)

district.description: District / City District (element 3124 within C058, second occurrence)

address_line_1.description: Address Line 1 (element 3124 within C058, third occurrence). Only in SG43.

address_line_2.description: Address Line 2 (element 3124 within C058, fourth occurrence). Only in SG43.

address_line_3.description: Address Line 3 (element 3124 within C058, fifth occurrence). Only in SG43.

party_name.description: Party name (element 3036 within C080). Required when C080 is present.

street_name.description: Street name (element 3042 within C059, first occurrence). Mandatory when C059 is used.

building_number.description: Building number (element 3042 within C059, second occurrence)

house_number.description: House number (element 3042 within C059, third occurrence)

address_line_4.description: Address line 4 (element 3042 within C059, fourth occurrence)

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code (element 1131 within C819)

province.description: Province (element 3228 within C819). Only in SG4.

country_name_code.description: Country name code (element 3207). ISO 3166 two-letter country code.

rules.description: Reference — provides reference numbers and identifiers for various purposes throughout the message

reference_qualifier.description: Reference function qualifier — VA=VAT registration, CU=Customer/Shipper ref, ACL=Mother shipment AWB, EI=EIN, HS=Harmonized System, MF=Manufacturer part, ZZZ=Mutually defined, DA=Account number, ERN=Original export tracking, CN=Original carrier, MRN=Movement Reference Number, FT=Free trade zone, ABW=SKU, BRD=Brand name, AFE/ABT/ANK/AVY=Additional reference

reference_country_code.description: Country code associated with the reference (used with VA for VAT country, FT for free trade zone country)

rules.description: References (Invoice Level) — registration numbers and invoice reference numbers in SG32. Up to 999 occurrences.

reference_code_qualifier.description: Reference code qualifier. CU=Consignor/Shipper's reference, ABT=MRN (Master Reference No.).

reference_identifier.description: Reference identifier (element 1154). The reference number value.

rules.description: Details of Transport — information related to a certain stage of transport within the consolidation

transport_stage_code_qualifier.description: Transport stage code qualifier — e.g. 20 = Main transport

means_of_transport_journey_identifier.description: Means of transport journey identifier — conveyance reference number

rules.description: Terms of Delivery — freight costs payment, Incoterms, product features, and account-based charge allocation in SG31

delivery_or_transport_form_function_code.description: Delivery or transport form function code — Use '6' for Delivery conditions.

transport_charges_payment_method_code.description: Transport charges payment method code. Use 'A' to indicate charges to an account. Only used when extra charge codes have related account numbers.

delivery_or_transport_terms_description_.description: Incoterms code. Default is 'DDU'. 'DDP' used for Loose Bulk services.

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code — Not used.

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code — Not used.

product_features.description: Product features/Extra Charge Codes. Each code is 3 digits with leading zero. Multiple codes concatenated without separator. Max 23 codes (AN..70).

account_numbers.description: Account Numbers for extra charges. Each is 9 characters, concatenated without separator. Must match order of related Extra Charge Codes in element 3.4. Max 7 (AN..70).

rules.description: Transport Service Requirements — contract/carriage conditions and service/priority requirements. Used in SG25 and SG49.

contract_and_carriage_condition.description: Contract and carriage condition — Not used.

transport_service_priority_code.description: Transport service priority code. DHL product code (e.g. 189=Express Worldwide EU at SG25, ECX=Express Worldwide EU at SG49).

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code — Use '57' for Product code.

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code — Use '87' for Assigned by carrier.

product_features.description: Product features/Extra Charge Codes. Each code is 3 digits with leading zero. Multiple codes concatenated without separator. Max 23 codes (AN..70).

account_numbers.description: Account Numbers for extra charges. Each is 9 characters, concatenated without separator. Must match order of related Extra Charge Codes in element 3.4. Max 7 (AN..70).

TSR.description: Transport Service Requirements — contract/carriage conditions and service/priority requirements. Used in SG25 and SG49.

contract_and_carriage_condition.description: Contract and carriage condition — Not used.

transport_service_priority_code.description: Transport service priority code. DHL product code (e.g. 189=Express Worldwide EU at SG25, ECX=Express Worldwide EU at SG49).

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code — Use '57' for Product code.

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code — Use '87' for Assigned by carrier.
